title: MNIST Handwritten Digits (CSV)
overview: Subsampled MNIST handwritten digits in CSV format. Each row represents a 28x28 grayscale image of a digit from 0 to 9.
usage_code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pjreddie/mnist-csv-png/main/mnist_train.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(url, header=None)
digits = data.iloc[:, 1:].values.reshape(-1, 28, 28)
labels = data.iloc[:, 0].values
